fields.text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
fields.author: Steve Jobs

fields.text: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
fields.author: Theodore Roosevelt

fields.text: It does not matter how slowly you go as long as you do not stop.
fields.author: Confucius

fields.text: The future belongs to those who believe in the beauty of their dreams.
fields.author: Eleanor Roosevelt

fields.text: Success is not final, failure is not fatal: it is the courage to continue that counts.
fields.author: Winston Churchill
